The species Odontoglossum recurvum is further classified as being part of the subgenus Odontoglossum, characterized by its unique flower shape and habit. Odontoglossum recurvum is commonly known as a type of orchid that produces showy, white to yellow flowers with a distinctive lip. The classification of Odontoglossum recurvum reflects its unique characteristics and its relationship to other orchid species within the same family and genus.
